hooks.template: If you're really a (insert dream result), why aren't you doing (insert common belief)?
hooks.text: If your bank wire is really free, why did 300 dollars vanish on a 10K payment?

hooks.template: Everyone tells you to (insert action) but nobody actually tells you how to do it. Here is a #-second step-by-step tutorial that you can save.
hooks.text: Everyone checks the fee line. Nobody tells you the real cost is hidden in the rate.

hooks.template: Yesterday I was at (insert location) when I noticed something (insert adjective).
hooks.text: A business owner checked his wire receipt and noticed something strange. Fee waived, 300 dollars gone.

hooks.template: They said, “(insert famous cliché or quote)” — that's a lie.
hooks.text: The bank said “no transfer fee”. On a 10K wire that line still costs 300 dollars.

hooks.template: My customer/client got (insert dream result) without (insert pain point).
hooks.text: Smart business owners keep that 300 on every 10K wire, no hidden margin in the rate.
